prompt: Create an elegant black-and-gold homepage inspired by Gatsby-era posters. Include geometric borders, thin-line icons, a center-aligned vertical timeline of upcoming shows, and interactive ticket cards that flip to reveal QR codes.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of an elegant, luxurious homepage designed in an Art Deco style, featuring a prominent black and gold color scheme. The page layout incorporates distinct geometric borders framing key content sections. A vertical timeline displaying upcoming shows is centrally aligned on the page. Below this timeline, display multiple interactive ticket cards, visually designed to indicate they can flip over to reveal a QR code on their reverse side. Integrate thin-line icons throughout the UI for navigation elements and within content sections.
objects: Ticket cards designed to indicate flipping
